    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PlayerPermissionHandler
    PlayerPermissionHandler.addExpiration(String perm, long seconds)
    Backwards-compatible: seconds-based timed permission.
    PlayerPermissionHandler
    PlayerPermissionHandler.addExpiration(String perm, com.bencodez.simpleapi.time.ParsedDuration duration)
    Adds a timed permission using ParsedDuration.
    PlayerPermissionHandler

    Backwards-compatible offline queue.
    PlayerPermissionHandler
    PlayerPermissionHandler.addOfflinePerm(String perm, com.bencodez.simpleapi.time.ParsedDuration duration)
    Queues a permission to apply on next login.
    PlayerPermissionHandler
    PlayerPermissionHandler.addPerm(String perm)
    Adds a permanent permission (persists across logouts).
